Table 1: Comparison on the TIR-Bench. The accuracy (%) across individual sub-tasks and the overall average is reported. Bold indicates the best results, while underlined denotes the second best.

Figure 2: Cold-start data synthesis pipeline. The pipeline automatically generates high-quality interleaved reasoning trajectories through combining sample initialization, solution planner, tool execution, reason generation, and error injection with reflection mechanisms.
Figure 8: Case study of InterSketch on VSP.

Figure 9: Case study of InterSketch on Math.
Figure 10: Case study of InterSketch on Symbolic Reasoning.

Figure 3: Two-stage training framework of InterSketch. SFT employs cold-start supervised finetuning on our synthetic interleaved reasoning dataset. The policy is enhanced within the RL stage via the stepwise reward, which evaluates the necessity and validity of each tool invocation.
Figure 5: Data statistics for the SFT and RL training stages.
